name: Earl vs. the Mutants
short_description: Save humanity in a mutant-ridden apocalypse! Dive headfirst into Earl vs. the Mutants, a high-octane top-down survival action-roguelite set in the aftermath of a nuclear apocalypse.
detailed_description:
OFFICIAL DISCORD SERVER


About the Game


Ever wondered what happens when the best pest control expert meets a nuclear apocalypse? Meet Earl, the sole employee of Edna’s Pest Control, and the winner of 37 consecutive Employee of the Month awards. When mutants overrun the world, only Earl and his boss Edna have the guts and the wheels to save humanity!

-- Why You'll Love Earl vs. the Mutants --

  • Be Earl: Step into the shoes of Earl, the underdog hero who uses his pest control skills to destroy the mutants
  • Crazy Combos: Combine vehicle-mounted weapons, attack drones, and wild powerups to create unstoppable builds
  • Fast and Furious: Quick runs averaging 5-10 minutes keep the action intense and engaging
  • Smash and Crash: Drive headfirst into mutant swarms and enjoy the carnage
  • Steam Deck Ready: Optimized for seamless play on Steam Deck!

-- Earl's World --

Navigate through 3D terrain, use elevation to your advantage, and prepare for epic boss battles that will test your skills. Each run is a new adventure with dynamic upgrades and permanent progress to keep you coming back for more.



Jump in the driver’s seat and join Edna and Earl on their mission to save the world, one mutant at a time!

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
